title: Martin Short Says Daughter Katherine’s Death Has Been a ‘Nightmare for the Family’: She ‘Fought For a Long Time With Extreme Mental Health’
summary: Martin Short has spoken out following the death of his daughter, Katherine Short, who died in February. She was 42. “It’s been a nightmare for the family,” Short told CBS Sunday Morning of Katherine’s death. “But the understanding [is] that mental health and cancer, like my wife’s, are both disease…

title: "يعادل القطبين".. رقم أسطوري ينتظر بيراميدز حال التتويج بلقب كأس مصر
summary: يستهدف الفريق الأول لكرة القدم بنادي بيراميدز، رقمًا تاريخيًا، حال نجح في التتويج بلقب كأس مصر للموسم الحالي 2025-2026.
